CREATE TABLE t1 (id INT, value INT);
CREATE TABLE t2 (id INT, value INT);
SELECT id FROM t1 WHERE id GLOBAL NOT IN (SELECT id FROM t2);
SELECT value FROM t1 WHERE id GLOBAL NOT IN (SELECT id FROM t2 WHERE value > 20);
SELECT t1.id, t1.value FROM t1 JOIN t2 ON t1.id = t2.id WHERE t1.value GLOBAL NOT IN (SELECT value FROM (SELECT value + 5 AS value FROM t2));
SELECT value FROM (SELECT id FROM t1 GLOBAL NOT IN (SELECT id FROM t2)) AS temp WHERE value <= 25;
SELECT t1.id FROM t1 WHERE id GLOBAL NOT IN (SELECT id FROM t2) AND value > (SELECT MAX(value) FROM t1);
CREATE TABLE t3 (id INT, category STRING);
SELECT * FROM t3 WHERE id GLOBAL NOT IN (SELECT id FROM t1 UNION SELECT id FROM t2);
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t1 WHERE id GLOBAL NOT IN (SELECT id FROM t2) AND value < 20;
SELECT value FROM t1 WHERE value GLOBAL NOT IN (SELECT value FROM t2 WHERE value < (SELECT MIN(value) FROM t2));
SELECT DISTINCT id FROM t1 WHERE id GLOBAL NOT IN (SELECT id FROM (SELECT * FROM t2 WHERE value > 10));
